recent_rejected_plans.reason: Rejected candidate because score delta was -0.0392

coverage_contract.problem_pattern: Image questions require extracting localized visual details, especially small or region-specific text/attributes, but failures come from not invoking any focused perception step.
supported_variations: Reading event/team names or other localized text from a photo region before answering a free-form question
Inspecting a specific object or region to describe an attribute, mood, count, or other visible property
unsupported_variations: Tasks needing external world knowledge beyond what is visually present in the image
forbidden_case_specific_assumptions: Do not hardcode a specific sports event, team names, or object category from one example
Do not rely on fixed coordinates, fixed crop locations, or one-off image layouts
Do not assume the answer is always text; first determine whether the question targets text, count, or visual attributes
coverage_contract.why_this_should_generalize: The dominant failure mode is procedural—failing to focus on the relevant image region or use available perception tools—so a reusable skill for targeted region inspection and tool selection should improve many family variants.
